news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
ETF flows point to ‘skittish' investors as it's ‘a little unwieldy out there' after Fed rate hikes

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity Buffer20 May ETF (MAYW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. MAYW was launched on Apr 28, 2023 and is issued by Allianz.
